view.title: Validate persona scenario #3

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 3 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of a persona scenario involving package transfer, but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation or functionality of this scenario. While the linked use case describes the transfer of classes, it does not provide any API responses or state checks that would allow for a deterministic validation of the scenario's outcome. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a clear requirement satisfaction or failure.
